import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    mut b = 0
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        i = i + 1
      else if b == 43
        i = i + 1
      end
      mut num = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        match string.byte_at(s, i)
        when Some(c)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            num = num * 10 + (c - 48)
            i = i + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        when None
          done = true
        end
      end
      result = list.push(result, num * sign)
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find_index(_ nums: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(nums, target)
end

fn handle(_ line1: String, _ line2: String) -> Unit
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(target)
    match find_index(nums, target)
    when Some(idx)
      println("index=#{idx}")
    when None
      println("not_found")
    end
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    handle(line1, line2)
  when None
    println("not_found")
  end
when None
  println("not_found")
end
